title: Replace broken CETA logo with CETA-2.png in navbar, hero, and footer

requirements.text: Save the uploaded CETA-2.png as a static asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/CETA-2.png and replace all broken CETA Galaxy logo image references in Navigation.tsx, HeroSection.tsx, and Footer.tsx with this new file path, preserving all existing sizing, positioning, and styling of those logo elements exactly as they appear in Version 9.

quotes: Simply replace the existing ones in the same spots
In Version 20, CETA logo is showing as a broken image icon
Replace broken logo images in the navbar, hero, and footer with the newly uploaded CETA-2.png

acceptanceCriteria: The CETA Galaxy logo renders correctly (no broken image icon) in the Navigation/navbar
The CETA Galaxy logo renders correctly in the HeroSection
The CETA Galaxy logo renders correctly in the Footer
All other content, layout, and styling from Version 9 remains unchanged

constraints: Use Version 9 as the base — do not carry over any other changes from Version 20
Only change the logo image source paths; do not alter sizing, layout, or any other styles
nonGoals: Changing any other images or assets
Modifying any text content or section layouts
Updating the HOPE logo or any other brand assets
